label.description: Accessible label for the chart. Required for screen readers.

description.description: Optional description rendered below the label.

label.description: Frequency label, e.g. '440 Hz' or '1 kHz'.

value.description: Magnitude or power for this bin. Non-negative.

bins.description: Frequency bins with label + magnitude value.

height.description: Pixel height of the chart. Default `160`.

loading.description: Whether the chart is in a loading state. Default `false`.

dataTableCaption.description: Custom data table caption; falls back to `label`.

class.description: Custom class applied to the root element.

unsupportedProps.name: empty
unsupportedProps.description: Snippet rendered when there are no bins.
